pattern: Since ANDing more numbers can only clear bits, the maximum possible subarray AND equals the array's maximum element, so the task reduces to the longest contiguous run of that maximum.
hints: Adding another element to a bitwise AND can never make it larger.
That means the best achievable AND is just the single largest value in the array.
Find the maximum, then measure the longest unbroken stretch where every element equals it.

edge_inputs.description: max value appears in a run of two
max is unique so run length one
all equal whole array is the run
two separate runs of the max, longer one wins

stress.description: random values over a small range so the maximum repeats and forms runs
stress.note: small range guarantees repeated maxima and multiple runs
